title: Refreshing Cucumber Raita
description: A cooling side dish perfect for hot summer days, made with yogurt, cucumber, and spices.

ingredients.name: xtra large onion, thinly sliced
ingredients.notes: Soak in cold water for 30 minutes to remove bitterness

instructions: In a bowl, whisk together yogurt, cumin powder, coriander powder, cayenne pepper, and salt.
In a separate bowl, combine the grated cucumber and crumbled tofu.
Add the sliced onion to the bowl with the cucumber and tofu mixture.
Mix well and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, stir in the grated ginger.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional cucumber slices if desired.
